narrative:
Precinct Coal I (precinct in Jackson County) has 225 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.1 percentage points.
